message:
🐛 Wire isDemoData + useReportCardDataState in 14 status cards (#10878)

* 🐛 Use TFunction type for translation params in formatters

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>

* 🐛 Wire isDemoData + useReportCardDataState in 14 status cards

14 status card components used useCached* hooks but never reported
isDemoData or isFailed/consecutiveFailures to CardWrapper via
useReportCardDataState. Result: Demo badge + yellow outline never
shown in demo mode; CardWrapper couldn't track failure state.

Fixed cards: openfga, cni, cortex, dapr, envoy, grpc, kserve,
kubevela, linkerd, openfeature, spiffe, strimzi, volcano, wasmcloud.

Each card now:
1. Destructures isDemoData, isFailed, consecutiveFailures from hook
2. Calls useReportCardDataState() to report state to CardWrapper

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>

* 🐛 Add 'unknown' to health type unions in status cards

TS2367 errors in 10+ status card files where comparisons like
health === 'unknown' failed because the health type unions did
not include 'unknown'. Added '| "unknown"' to all affected
health type definitions.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
